growth_records.medium: TMM (Tris-buffered mineral salts medium) with 2 g/liter sodium gluconate
growth_records.cite: Große et al. Characterization of the Δ7 Mutant of Cupriavidus metallidurans with Deletions of Seven Secondary Metal Uptake Systems. mSystems (2016). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.00004-16. [PMC5069749]
growth_records.snippet: Bacterial strain AE104 ... Growth rate (1/h) ... None 0.29 ± 0.03/0 ... Strain AE104 and its mutant derivatives were cultivated in TMM at 30°C without further additions
growth_records.notes: Growth rate directly reported in Table 4 (AE104, no metal added: 0.29 ± 0.03 h-1). Doubling_time_h calculated as ln2/mu = ln(2)/0.29 = 2.39 h (formula stated generically by curator; not from paper's own doubling-time statement, but paper elsewhere confirms rates of 0.2-0.3 h-1 correspond to doubling times 2.3-3.5 h, consistent).

growth_records.medium: TMM (Tris-buffered mineral salts medium) with 2 g/liter sodium gluconate, amended with 10 µM CoCl2
growth_records.cite: Große et al. Characterization of the Δ7 Mutant of Cupriavidus metallidurans with Deletions of Seven Secondary Metal Uptake Systems. mSystems (2016). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.00004-16. [PMC5069749]
growth_records.snippet: AE104 ... 0.26 ± 0.07/0 [growth rate/lag phase after 10 µM CoCl2] (Table 4)
growth_records.notes: Growth rate directly reported in Table 4, AE104 column '10 µM CoCl2': 0.26 ± 0.07 h-1, lag phase 0 h.

growth_records.medium: TMM with 2 g/liter sodium gluconate, amended with 10 µM ZnCl2
growth_records.cite: Große et al. Characterization of the Δ7 Mutant of Cupriavidus metallidurans with Deletions of Seven Secondary Metal Uptake Systems. mSystems (2016). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.00004-16. [PMC5069749]
growth_records.snippet: AE104 ... 0.23 ± 0.01/0 [growth rate/lag phase after 10 µM ZnCl2] (Table 4)
growth_records.notes: Growth rate directly reported in Table 4, AE104 column '10 µM ZnCl2': 0.23 ± 0.01 h-1, lag phase 0 h.

growth_records.medium: TMM with 2 g/liter sodium gluconate, amended with 2.5 µM CdCl2
growth_records.cite: Große et al. Characterization of the Δ7 Mutant of Cupriavidus metallidurans with Deletions of Seven Secondary Metal Uptake Systems. mSystems (2016). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.00004-16. [PMC5069749]
growth_records.snippet: AE104 ... 0.23 ± 0.06/0 [growth rate/lag phase after 2.5 µM CdCl2] (Table 4)
growth_records.notes: Growth rate directly reported in Table 4, AE104 column '2.5 µM CdCl2': 0.23 ± 0.06 h-1, lag phase 0 h.

growth_records.strain: Δ8 (AE104 background, 8 secondary metal-uptake-system genes deleted)
growth_records.medium: TMM with 2 g/liter sodium gluconate, amended with 2.5 µM CdCl2
growth_records.cite: Große et al. Characterization of the Δ7 Mutant of Cupriavidus metallidurans with Deletions of Seven Secondary Metal Uptake Systems. mSystems (2016). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.00004-16. [PMC5069749]
growth_records.snippet: Δ8 ... 0.17 ± 0.04/0 [growth rate/lag phase after 2.5 µM CdCl2] (Table 4); '...decreased slightly...from 0.23 ± 0.06 h-1 to 0.17 ± 0.04 h-1 in the Δ8 mutant'
growth_records.notes: Growth rate directly reported in Table 4, Δ8 column '2.5 µM CdCl2': 0.17 ± 0.04 h-1.

growth_records.strain: Δ9 (AE104 background, 9 secondary metal-uptake-system genes deleted)
growth_records.medium: TMM with 2 g/liter sodium gluconate, no metal added
growth_records.cite: Große et al. Characterization of the Δ7 Mutant of Cupriavidus metallidurans with Deletions of Seven Secondary Metal Uptake Systems. mSystems (2016). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.00004-16. [PMC5069749]
growth_records.notes: Growth rate directly reported in Table 4, Δ9 column 'None': 0.23 ± 0.05 h-1, lag phase 2.8 h.

growth_records.strain: Δ9 (AE104 background, 9 secondary metal-uptake-system genes deleted)
growth_records.medium: TMM with 2 g/liter sodium gluconate, amended with 2.5 µM CdCl2
growth_records.cite: Große et al. Characterization of the Δ7 Mutant of Cupriavidus metallidurans with Deletions of Seven Secondary Metal Uptake Systems. mSystems (2016). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.00004-16. [PMC5069749]
growth_records.snippet: In the presence of cadmium, the growth rate was decreased to 0.06 h−1, representing a doubling time of nearly 12 h. ... Δ9 ... 0.06 ± 0.01/0 (Table 4)
growth_records.notes: Growth rate 0.06 h-1 reported directly (Table 4 / text); paper states this represents 'a doubling time of nearly 12 h'. Curator cross-check: ln(2)/0.06 = 11.55 h, consistent with paper's 'nearly 12 h' statement.

growth_records.strain: Δ9 (AE104 background, 9 secondary metal-uptake-system genes deleted)
growth_records.medium: TMM with 2 g/liter sodium gluconate, amended with 10 µM CoCl2
growth_records.cite: Große et al. Characterization of the Δ7 Mutant of Cupriavidus metallidurans with Deletions of Seven Secondary Metal Uptake Systems. mSystems (2016). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.00004-16. [PMC5069749]
growth_records.snippet: These cells grew at a rate of 0.19 h−1 or a doubling time of 3.65 h ... the Δ9 strain in the presence of cobalt (Table 4), longest lag phase 10.9 h
growth_records.notes: Both growth rate (0.19 h-1) and doubling time (3.65 h) explicitly stated together in the text for the Δ9 strain + 10 µM CoCl2 condition (lag phase 10.9 h).

phenotypes.base_medium: Sole-substrate growth / assimilation on a defined minimal medium (substrate as C/N/energy source) — positive = the organism grows on it
phenotypes.citation: BacDive strain 2038 (Reimer LC et al., BacDive 2022, NAR); https://bacdive.dsmz.de/strain/2038

phenotypes.base_medium: Acid/gas-production test: peptone/complex base + substrate + pH indicator — positive = fermentative acid production, NOT growth on the substrate as a sole carbon source (interpret with care for model validation)
phenotypes.citation: BacDive strain 2038 (Reimer LC et al., BacDive 2022, NAR); https://bacdive.dsmz.de/strain/2038

carbon_growth.medium: TMM (Tris-buffered mineral salts medium) with 2 g/liter sodium gluconate, amende
carbon_growth.citation: Große et al. Characterization of the Δ7 Mutant of Cupriavidus metallidurans with Deletions of Seven Secondary Metal Uptake Systems. mSystems (2016). DOI:10.1128/mSystems.00004-16.
